builders.task: Produce manifest.json + placeholder icon PNGs for the .sdPlugin bundle skeleton (v1; macOS).
Rebuild manifest.json with Windows-only OS, Nodejs.Version='20', CodePathWin='plugin/main.js', no CodePathMac, updated Description.

AA.S1.1.note: Folder name realized at integration time.

AA.S1.2.note: manifest.json parses; all v3 required keys present (Name, Version, Author, Description, Icon, Category, CategoryIcon, OS, SDKVersion, Software, CodePathWin, Nodejs, Actions). CodePathMac correctly absent.

AA.S1.3.note: All referenced paths resolve in integrated bundle. CodePathWin='plugin/main.js' is a .js file present in the bundle.
